zh.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley是Reynold Paveley II的女兒，於大約1384年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特沙維其可。她於大約1399年與Sir John Camell在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1443年在她的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley是Reynold Paveley II的女儿，于大约1384年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特沙維其可。她于大约1399年与Sir John Camell在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1443年在她的家乡享年60岁。

variants.name: Pavelin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Paveley ( see Pawley ) with an excrescent -n.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley was born about 1384, in Shapwick, Dorset, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Reynold Paveley II. She married Sir John Camell about 1399, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1443, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley est née environ 1384, à Shapwick, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Reynold Paveley II. Elle a épousé Sir John Camell environ 1399, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1443, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley wurde um 1384 in Shapwick, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Reynold Paveley II geboren. Sie hat um 1399 in England, United Kingdom Sir John Camell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1443 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley è nata il circa 1384 nel Shapwick, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Reynold Paveley II. Lei sposato Sir John Camell circa 1399, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1443, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveleyは約1384年にイギリスイギリスドールセトシャプウィックでReynold Paveley IIの娘として生まれた。約1399年にイギリスイギリスでSir John Camellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1443年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley(은)는 대략 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 샤p윅에서 Reynold Paveley II의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1399년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Camell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley nasceu aproximadamente 1384, em Shapwick, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Reynold Paveley II. Ela casou-se com Sir John Camell aproximadamente 1399, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1443, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley родилась около 1384 г. в местности шапвикк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Reynold Paveley II. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Camell около 1399 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1443 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabella Sybil Paveley nació aproximadamente 1384, en Shapwick, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Reynold Paveley II. Se casó con Sir John Camell aproximadamente 1399, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1443, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
